_comment: Source of truth for whatsapp-send recipients. Place the real file somewhere synced across all machines that send notifications (typically Google Drive for Desktop, e.g. G:\My Drive\EVGData\config\recipients.json). Each machine's whatsapp-send skill reads from the path saved as the 'WhatsApp recipients' reference memory and as RecipientsPath in run-sale-audit.ps1. Edit on any machine; Drive auto-syncs to others within seconds.

_schema.name: Free text. Used in logs, never in the message body.
_schema.whatsapp: E.164 format with leading '+', no spaces or dashes. Sandbox testing requires the recipient to have sent 'join <two-words>' to the Twilio sandbox number first.
_schema.stations: Array of station codes the recipient should receive: any of 'TK', 'BS', 'BL'. Use ['*'] to match all stations.
_schema.languages: Array of audit languages: 'EN' and/or 'CH'. The skill sends one WhatsApp per station regardless of language; this filters whether the recipient gets the message at all. Use ['*'] for all.
_schema.reports: Array of report types: 'sale-audit' today. Use ['*'] for all.
_schema.active: true (default) or false. Set false to mute without removing the row.
_schema.notes: Optional free text, ignored by the skill.

recipients.name: Former staff (muted)
recipients.notes: Left 2026-04. Keep row for audit trail; active=false suppresses sends.
